steps.command: python3 -c "import re, datetime; lines=open('improvement-log.md').read(); dates=re.findall(r'###\s+\[(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})\]', lines); proposed=[d for d in dates if '[ ] proposed' in lines[lines.index(d):lines.index(d)+500]]; stale=[d for d in proposed if (datetime.datetime.now()-datetime.datetime.strptime(d,'%Y-%m-%d')).days>30]; print(f'{len(stale)} findings >30d without recurrence')"
